title: MacroPulse Alert
message:
UMich Sentiment (Jul prelim): 54.4 vs 51.0 est — 5-month high, second straight monthly gain.
CLARITY Act: House hearing concluded; Polymarket passage odds at record low — Senate ethics impasse unresolved.
Netflix -9% on weak Q3 guidance; Coinbase -3%, BTC miners -6 to -8%, S&P 500 -0.5%.
BTC ~$63,800 (-1.4%) · ETH ~$1,865 (-2.8%) — below alert thresholds.
